real_email_source: Apache httpd dev public mailing list archives via lists.apache.org mbox API

surface_01_stale_ci_token.theme: temporary CI/deploy token extended and left active after the migration window

surface_02_shared_release_account.theme: shared release/signing account used by multiple maintainers instead of named credentials

surface_03_hosted_metrics_data_scope.theme: hosted metrics mirror classified as public-only despite collecting reporter addresses, IPs, or private issue metadata

surface_04_missing_dependency_audit_atta.theme: dependency/security review attachment missing while a release or infrastructure change continues

deep_issue.theme: Peregrine BuildWorks / Nightjar CI infrastructure exception chain involving split access requests, understated data exposure, missing security review materials, token and artifact access before signoff, legal/service-owner mismatch, possible maintainer affiliation concern, reused project scripts presented as vendor validation, release pressure, and records split across dev, infra, and private threads.

acceptable_labels: missing dependency or security review attachment
reused project work presented as external validation

score_expectation.deep_issue_strong_answer: Finds at least 18 deep ids or reconstructs all critical links with at least 12 ids and low hallucination.
